summary: Horror theme park website with ticketing, events calendar, auditions, employee portal with secret tunnels, haunted houses including 'Toys Come to Play', and 2030 expansion plans featuring new costume characters
architectural_notes: Employee Portal contains Secret Tunnels section with room assignments and interactive map
Haunted Houses section displays multiple themed attractions with character and scene information
Auditions section separated by role type (makeup artists vs SFX artists)
2030 expansion features new costume character categories and updated audition requirements
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Haunted house exterior photo showing toy-themed horror attraction with prominent entrance (toys-come-to-play-exterior.dim_1200x600.png)
- Interior scene showing Blippy character in creepy toy setting with dark atmospheric lighting (blippy-scene.dim_800x600.png)
- Interior scene showing Jiffy character in menacing pose among scattered toys (jiffy-scene.dim_800x600.png)
- Promotional banner showing Lola the Rabbit and Asher the Rabbit costume characters in friendly pose (lola-asher-rabbits.dim_1000x600.png)
- Character illustration of Max costume character in vibrant family-friendly style (max-character.dim_600x800.png)
- Character illustration of DD costume character in colorful cheerful design (dd-character.dim_600x800.png)

existing_features.title: Add 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house to the Haunted Houses section with tagline 'never talk back we just want to rip ur head off'
Add characters Blippy and Jiffy to 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house with scene description 'out of breath and almost head' integrated into the 22 different scenes information system
Add 2030 investment announcement featuring new costume characters: Lola the Rabbit, Asher the Rabbit (her boyfriend), Max, and DD, plus all new princesses
Add audition information for 2030 costume characters emphasizing vocal skills with note that 'some sing some don't'

new_feature_requests.summary: Add 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house with Blippy and Jiffy characters, 22 scenes, and tagline
Add 2030 investment announcement with new costume characters (Lola, Asher, Max, DD) and princesses section with audition info
Create Room Assignments page in Secret Tunnels area showing tunnel room assignments by role
Build interactive tunnel map with clickable floor plan showing all rooms (makeup, haunted house entrances, hot tubs, game room, cafeteria, security)
Add auditions schedules: makeup artists (March) in Auditions section, SFX artists in Employee Portal
